Long Description: No QA has been assigned yet
Risk Trigger: Development will be over by mid next week. We need test cases preparation until then.
Mitigation Options: Allocation of a QA minimum for half day

Long Description: Module and framework structure has changed multiple times (32 to 27 frameworks, modules restructured). New frameworks introduced, mapping changes, field/tab changes post-discussion. This causes redevelopment and timeline slips. Update (May 2026): Module list now at 11 modules / 27 frameworks per client restructuring.
Risk Trigger: During delivery milestones when scope changes are requested
Mitigation Options: Freeze requirements per sprint. Use signed Solution Document as baseline. Any changes go through formal change request process.
Remarks: Reduced probability from 6 to 5 as framework list stabilizing.

Long Description: Client team not performing end-to-end UAT and providing feedback of the whole portal. Partial or delayed UAT means bugs discovered late, impacting go-live readiness.
Risk Trigger: Client does not complete UAT within agreed window
Mitigation Options: Structured UAT plan with checklist per module. Weekly UAT progress tracking. Escalate in steerco if UAT stalls.
Remarks: Carried forward. Probability increased - UAT has been slow.

Long Description: PM manages 4 active projects (Prime Rural, Pradan Pragati, Samarth Agri, MFIN Radar). This limits dedicated focus time for stakeholder engagement and document management. Mitigated via AI-assisted project management and living docs.
Risk Trigger: During delivery milestones requiring intensive client coordination
Mitigation Options: Leverage AI-assisted project management (Claude Code), maintain living heartbeat docs, prioritize weekly client syncs for Prime Rural.

Long Description: No formal go-live date has been committed. Without a target date, there is no forcing function for UAT completion, training, or deployment preparation. Multiple open questions (13+) remain unresolved.
Risk Trigger: PM unable to confirm go-live date after repeated asks
Mitigation Options: Escalate in steerco. Request client to commit a go-live target. Work backwards from target to set UAT and training milestones.
Remarks: New risk. Critical for project planning.

Long Description: Flutter offline-first app must work reliably in low-connectivity rural Meghalaya (80 fellows across all blocks). Sync conflicts, data loss, or slow sync could cripple field adoption.
Risk Trigger: Fellow enters data offline and sync fails or produces duplicates on reconnection
Mitigation Options: Thorough offline sync testing on slow connections. Conflict resolution strategy documented. Pilot with 5-10 fellows before full rollout.
Remarks: New risk. Critical for field adoption.

Long Description: 13+ open items pending from client: BPC HTML, EPR spec, framework task lists, logo/carousel assets, Infrastructure and Funding module specs. Each blocks specific development or documentation.
Risk Trigger: Client does not provide assets within 2 weeks of request
Mitigation Options: Track all pending items in shared tracker. Raise in weekly sync. Escalate blockers older than 2 weeks to steerco.
Remarks: New risk. 13 items pending per heartbeat.

Long Description: Steerco was established and first one conducted (8 Apr 2026). Monthly cadence needed for implementation project but second steerco not yet scheduled.
Risk Trigger: More than 6 weeks pass between steercos
Mitigation Options: Schedule next steerco immediately. Set recurring calendar invite for monthly cadence.
Remarks: First steerco was successful. Must maintain momentum.
